Container.Name: hermes-desktop
Container.Overview:
Access Hermes Agent through a web-based desktop that works on any device including mobile.
Runs the Hermes Electron app inside a KasmVNC container with auto-resize, virtual keyboard, and clipboard sync. Connects to a Hermes Agent backend running locally or remotely (e.g. via Tailscale).
[b]Tailscale integration:[/b] If your Hermes backend is on another machine, install the Tailscale plugin on Unraid and use its Tailscale IP (100.x.x.x) as the backend URL. Enable "Use Tailscale" on this container to access the desktop from anywhere via HTTPS.
Container.ExtraSearchTerms: hermes nous ai agent llm vnc remote desktop
Container.Requires: A running Hermes Agent backend is required. Install it separately or connect to a remote instance via Tailscale.

Config.Name: WebUI Port
Config.Description: KasmVNC web client port. Open this in your browser to access the Hermes desktop.

Config.Name: Backend URL
Config.Description: URL of your Hermes Agent backend. Use a LAN IP (e.g. http://192.168.1.50:9119) or a Tailscale IP (e.g. http://100.x.x.x:9119).

Config.Name: Backend Token
Config.Description: Session token from your Hermes Agent backend. Found in the dashboard logs on first startup.

Config.Name: PUID
Config.Description: User ID for file permissions. Unraid default: 99 (nobody).

Config.Name: PGID
Config.Description: Group ID for file permissions. Unraid default: 100 (users).

Config.Name: Disable Auth
Config.Description: Disable KasmVNC basic auth. Only set to true when access is secured by Tailscale ACLs or another network-layer mechanism.

Config.Name: Disable GPU
Config.Description: Disable GPU acceleration in Electron. Recommended to keep enabled (1) for containers.

Config.Name: Window Title
Config.Description: Title shown in the KasmVNC browser tab.

Config.Name: No Window Decorations
Config.Description: Remove window decorations for a cleaner fullscreen experience.
